title: Heat Exchanger Fouling Loss Calculator
description: Calculates energy and production losses due to fouling in shell-and-tube heat exchangers, based on ISO 50001, Six Sigma DMAIC, and Lean manufacturing principles.

inputs.label: Design Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient × Area (UA_design)
inputs.businessContext: Clean design UA from manufacturer datasheet or initial commissioning test (ISO 50001:2018, Annex B).

label_i18n.en: Design Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient × Area (UA_design)
label_i18n.tr: Tasarım Toplam Isı Transfer Katsayısı × Alan (UA_tasarım)
label_i18n.fr: Coefficient global de transfert thermique × Surface de conception (UA_conception)
label_i18n.es: Coeficiente global de transferencia de calor × Área de diseño (UA_diseño)
label_i18n.ar: معامل انتقال الحرارة الكلي التصميمي × المساحة (UA_design)

businessContext_i18n.en: Clean design UA from manufacturer datasheet or initial commissioning test (ISO 50001:2018, Annex B).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretici veri sayfasından veya ilk devreye alma testinden temiz tasarım UA değeri (ISO 50001:2018, Ek B).
businessContext_i18n.de: Reine Auslegungs-UA aus Herstellerdatenblatt oder Erstinbetriebnahmetest (ISO 50001:2018, Anhang B).
businessContext_i18n.fr: UA de conception propre issu de la fiche technique du fabricant ou de l'essai de mise en service initial (ISO 50001:2018, Annexe B).
businessContext_i18n.es: UA de diseño limpio según hoja de datos del fabricante o prueba de puesta en marcha inicial (ISO 50001:2018, Anexo B).
businessContext_i18n.ar: UA التصميمي النظيف من ورقة بيانات الشركة المصنعة أو اختبار التشغيل الأولي (ISO 50001:2018، الملحق ب).

inputs.label: Actual Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient × Area (UA_actual)
inputs.businessContext: Current measured UA from process data (temperature, flow) using heat balance. Indicates fouling severity.

label_i18n.en: Actual Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient × Area (UA_actual)
label_i18n.tr: Gerçek Toplam Isı Transfer Katsayısı × Alan (UA_gerçek)
label_i18n.fr: Coefficient global de transfert thermique × Surface réel (UA_réel)
label_i18n.es: Coeficiente global de transferencia de calor × Área real (UA_real)
label_i18n.ar: معامل انتقال الحرارة الكلي الفعلي × المساحة (UA_actual)

businessContext_i18n.en: Current measured UA from process data (temperature, flow) using heat balance. Indicates fouling severity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Proses verilerinden (sıcaklık, debi) ısı dengesi kullanılarak ölçülen mevcut UA. Kirlenme şiddetini gösterir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelle gemessene UA aus Prozessdaten (Temperatur, Durchfluss) mittels Wärmebilanz. Zeigt Verschmutzungsgrad an.
businessContext_i18n.fr: UA actuelle mesurée à partir des données de procédé (température, débit) par bilan thermique. Indique la sévérité de l'encrassement.
businessContext_i18n.es: UA actual medido a partir de datos de proceso (temperatura, caudal) mediante balance de calor. Indica la severidad de la incrustación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: UA الفعلي المقاس من بيانات العملية (درجة الحرارة، التدفق) باستخدام توازن الحرارة. يشير إلى شدة التلوث.

inputs.label: Hot Fluid Inlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of hot process stream entering the heat exchanger.

label_i18n.es: Temperatura de entrada del fluido caliente

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature of hot process stream entering the heat exchanger.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Isı değiştiriciye giren sıcak proses akışının sıcaklığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur des heißen Prozessstroms am Eintritt des Wärmetauschers.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température du fluide chaud entrant dans l'échangeur de chaleur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura de la corriente de proceso caliente que entra al intercambiador de calor.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة حرارة تيار العملية الساخن الداخل إلى المبادل الحراري.

inputs.label: Cold Fluid Inlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of cooling or heating utility entering the exchanger.

label_i18n.es: Temperatura de entrada del fluido frío

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature of cooling or heating utility entering the exchanger.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Isı değiştiriciye giren soğutma veya ısıtma yardımcı akışkanının sıcaklığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur des Kühl- oder Heizmediums am Eintritt des Wärmetauschers.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température du fluide de refroidissement ou de chauffage entrant dans l'échangeur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura del servicio de calefacción o refrigeración que entra al intercambiador.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة حرارة مرافق التبريد أو التسخين الداخلة إلى المبادل.

inputs.label: Hot Fluid Mass Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Mass flow rate of the hot process stream.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass flow rate of the hot process stream.
businessContext_i18n.es: Caudal másico de la corriente de proceso caliente.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل تدفق كتلة تيار العملية الساخن.

inputs.label: Hot Fluid Specific Heat Capacity
inputs.businessContext: Average specific heat of hot fluid over operating temperature range.

label_i18n.fr: Capacité thermique spécifique du fluide chaud
label_i18n.es: Capacidad calorífica específica del fluido caliente

businessContext_i18n.en: Average specific heat of hot fluid over operating temperature range.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışma sıcaklık aralığında sıcak akışkanın ortalama özgül ısısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mittlere spezifische Wärme des Heißmediums im Betriebstemperaturbereich.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Chaleur spécifique moyenne du fluide chaud sur la plage de température de fonctionnement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Calor específico promedio del fluido caliente en el rango de temperatura de operación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط الحرارة النوعية للسائل الساخن على مدى درجة حرارة التشغيل.

inputs.label: Energy Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of thermal energy (steam, hot water, or electricity for pumping).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of thermal energy (steam, hot water, or electricity for pumping).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Termal enerji maliyeti (buhar, sıcak su veya pompalama için elektrik).
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten der thermischen Energie (Dampf, Heißwasser oder Strom für Pumpen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de l'énergie thermique (vapeur, eau chaude ou électricité pour le pompage).
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de la energía térmica (vapor, agua caliente o electricidad para bombeo).
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة الطاقة الحرارية (بخار، ماء ساخن، أو كهرباء للضخ).

inputs.label: Operating Hours per Year
inputs.businessContext: Annual operating hours of the heat exchanger.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual operating hours of the heat exchanger.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heures de fonctionnement annuelles de l'échangeur de chaleur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas de operación anuales del intercambiador de calor.

rules.message: Actual UA cannot exceed design UA. Check measurement or input values.
Hot inlet temperature must be greater than cold inlet temperature for proper heat transfer.
If fouling factor is known, it must be a positive number.

thresholds.message: Fouling resistance exceeds 0.001 m²·K/kW – immediate cleaning recommended.
Annual energy loss cost exceeds $50,000 – investigate cleaning schedule optimization.
Production loss cost exceeds $100,000 – consider redundancy or advanced anti-fouling coatings.
